auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to see your data across all your devices.
auth.confirmEmailSent: Almost there — confirm the link in your email, then sign in.

errors.emailTaken: An account already exists for this email.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak (at least 6 characters).
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.network: No connection. Check your network and try again.
errors.notConfigured: Sign-in is not set up yet.

welcome.title: Welcome to Weeko
welcome.subtitle: Your week is planned externally — Weeko guides you through it: timeline, tasks, training, reminders.

structure.title: Your weekly structure
structure.subtitle: Work hours, work location and fixed blocks — all editable later.

profile.title: Body profile
profile.subtitle: Phase 1 only stores these values — calorie math comes later.

equipment.title: Equipment & exercises
equipment.subtitle: We derive an exercise list from your equipment — fully editable.

preferences.title: Language & theme
preferences.subtitle: How should Weeko look and speak?

finish.title: All set!
finish.subtitle: Import your AI-planned week as JSON on Sunday — or look around first.

empty.title: No week planned yet
empty.subtitle: Import your AI's JSON plan or create a week from a template.

import.title: Week import
import.subtitle: Paste JSON or pick a file — Weeko validates and shows a preview.
import.warningsSubtitle: Warnings don't block the import — you decide.

errors.dateOutsideWeek: Date is outside the declared ISO week.
errors.missingOrWrongType: Field is missing or has the wrong type.

warnings.bigTrainingBeforeHandballDay: “{{title}}” on {{date}}: big own training the day before a handball day.
warnings.trainingOnRegenerationDay: “{{title}}” on {{date}}: Wednesday & Sunday are regeneration anchors — no intense training.
warnings.bigTrainingBeforeSameDayHandball: “{{title}}” on {{date}}: big session with handball later the same day.

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: Tap blocks to edit. Applying replaces the target week.
preview.replaceMessage: Week {{week}}/{{year}} already exists. The import replaces all blocks and week tasks.

today.title: Today
today.noWeek: Nothing imported for this week yet.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty: No tasks — import a week or create one.

micros.title: Vitamins & minerals
micros.hint: Percent of the daily reference intake (EU NRV). Not every product reports micronutrients – treat these as a lower bound.

add.title: Add food
add.noResults: No results. Tip: scan the barcode – Lidl/Aldi products are almost always covered by barcode.
add.notFound: Product not found. You can add it as a custom entry.
add.networkError: Open Food Facts is not reachable right now.
add.customHint: Values are per 100 g — the amount determines what is counted. With a barcode the product becomes scannable later.
add.cameraPermission: Camera access is required to scan barcodes.
add.scannerWebUnsupported: This browser does not support camera scanning – just type the barcode instead.
add.attribution: Product data: Open Food Facts (openfoodfacts.org, ODbL)

supplements.title: Nutrient check
supplements.intro: Below 50% of the daily reference on average over the last {{days}} tracked days:

sources.vitaminA: Good sources: carrots, sweet potato, spinach, eggs
sources.vitaminC: Good sources: bell pepper, broccoli, kiwi, citrus fruit
sources.vitaminD: Hard to cover through food — mainly sunlight; some in fatty fish and eggs
sources.vitaminE: Good sources: almonds, olive oil, peanut butter
sources.vitaminB12: Good sources: fish, meat, dairy, eggs (a supplement is required on a vegan diet)
sources.folate: Good sources: spinach, lentils, chickpeas, broccoli
sources.calcium: Good sources: dairy, cheese, tofu, almonds
sources.iron: Good sources: oats, lentils, beef, spinach
sources.magnesium: Good sources: nuts, oats, whole grains, flaxseed
sources.potassium: Good sources: potatoes, bananas, avocado, legumes
sources.zinc: Good sources: beef, cheese, oats, nuts
sources.iodine: Good sources: sea fish, milk, iodized salt

supplements.supplementNote: If a value stays low for weeks despite a varied diet, a supplement can make sense — when in doubt, clarify the dosage with a doctor.
supplements.dataNote: Products without micronutrient labels don't count here — basic foods from the search are fully covered.

training.title: Training
training.abortConfirm: Really abort the session? Logged sets stay saved.
training.searchNoResults: No exercise found — add it in the settings below.
training.emptySessionBody: Pick your first exercise — sets and weights are prefilled from last time.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.legend: {{count}} training days this year — every glowing dot is one day

import.title: Training import
import.subtitle: Describe your workout to an AI (prompt below) and paste its JSON answer here — Weeko validates and shows a preview.

prompt.title: Prompt for your AI
prompt.hint: Copy the prompt, append your workout description and paste the JSON answer above.
prompt.failed: Copying not possible — please select manually.
prompt.intro: You convert my workout description into JSON for the app Weeko. I will describe one or more completed training sessions in free text. Reply ONLY with valid JSON following exactly this schema — no explanations, no markdown code block:
prompt.rules:
Rules:
- Date as YYYY-MM-DD (today is {{date}}), time as HH:mm (24h).
- "weightKg" is the added weight for calisthenics, otherwise the total weight moved; pure bodyweight sets carry only "reps".
- Only include "start" and "durationMinutes" if I mention them.
- The equipment does NOT belong in the exercise name — put it in the optional "equipment" field (e.g. "Cable", "Dumbbell", "Machine"). Prefer these equipment names: {{equipment}}.
- Prefer these exact exercise names (without equipment in the name): {{exercises}}.
- Exercises or equipment outside the lists get a short, clear name (they will be created).
- Cardio/mobility exercises with no countable sets get "sets": [].

Here is my training description:

errors.missingOrWrongType: Field is missing or has the wrong type.

export.title: Analysis export
export.subtitle: All data of a period as JSON — paste it into Claude & co. for an analysis.
export.healthWebHint: Sleep/health data comes from Apple Health and is only included in the iOS app.
export.empty: No data available for this period.
export.failed: Copying not possible — please try again.
export.prompt:
You are my training and health coach. Analyze my data from the tracking app Weeko for {{label}} ({{start}} to {{end}}). The data contains the weekly plan (blocks with status), training (sets as [reps, kg], kg = added weight for weighted calisthenics), nutrition per day, body weight and possibly sleep/health metrics (sleep in minutes).

Give me:
1. The most important observations on training, nutrition, sleep and weight.
2. Connections between the areas (e.g. sleep vs. training performance, calories vs. weight trend).
3. Concrete, prioritized recommendations for the next period.
Be honest and specific — no platitudes.

Data:

stats.title: Statistics
stats.subtitle: Trends and records from your data — training, nutrition, week plan and health.

training.empty: No finished sessions yet — complete a workout to see statistics.
training.volumeLegend: Σ reps × kg per week (last 8 weeks) · avg {{sessions}} sessions/week
training.monthlyVolumeLegend: Σ reps × kg per month (last 12) · avg {{sessions}} sessions/month
training.progressionEmpty: No logged sets for this exercise yet.
training.chartLegend: Green bars mark a new record.
training.weightGainHint: Average weight gain from 2nd session onwards (new exercises count from the 2nd time).
training.weightGainEmpty: No progression yet — train each exercise at least 2× for comparison.

food.empty: No entries yet — log meals to see statistics.
food.kcalWeeklyLegend: Avg kcal per tracked day (last 4 weeks) · target {{target}} kcal
food.proteinLegend: Avg protein per tracked day vs. the daily target.
food.microTrendHint: Avg % of daily need per tracked day, oldest to newest week (only values with data).
food.macroLegend: Avg per tracked day vs. your target. Sugar/salt/sat. fat are upper limits (orange = over), fiber is a minimum.
food.qualityEmpty: Not enough entries yet for a quality overview.

plan.empty: No week planned and no tasks yet — import a week to see statistics.
plan.adherenceLegend: Share of completed blocks per week (last 8 weeks).
plan.timeBudgetLegend: Done vs. planned hours per block type (latest week).
plan.weekdayLegend: Share of skipped blocks per weekday (all loaded weeks).

health.noData: No health data found for the last 7 days.
health.daysWithData: Avg over {{count}} of {{total}} days with data
health.readinessLegend: Readiness score per day (from HRV, sleep, resting HR; color-coded by level).
health.weightLegend: Weight trend over the last 30 days with % change.
health.weightEmpty: No measurements yet — start weight tracking in the Health tab.

body.title: Body trends
body.empty: No body data yet. Add measurements via the scale icon on the Today screen.
body.needMore: At least 2 entries for a trend.

settings.title: Settings

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Per category: on/off, quiet hours and escalation interval.
notifications.webUnsupported: Local notifications are not available in the browser — use the iOS/Android app.
notifications.permissionDenied: Notifications are disabled at the system level.

data.title: Data
data.demoHint: Fills every screen with realistic history (weight, training, nutrition, weeks) — for testing.
data.deleteConfirmMessage: All weeks, tasks, workouts and settings will be permanently deleted.
data.deleteSelectiveHint: Removes only the chosen category — from the cloud too. Everything else stays.
data.deleteCategoryMessage: “{{name}}” will be permanently removed — from the cloud too. Other data is untouched.

settings.about: Weeko — local, offline, your data stays on your device.

nutrition.title: Nutrition goals
nutrition.hint: Empty fields are derived from your profile automatically.

taskEscalation.title: Still open: {{title}}
taskEscalation.body: Complete it or mute it in settings.

health.title: Sleep & health
health.webUnsupported: Apple Health data (sleep, activity) is only available in the iOS app.
health.connectHint: Shows sleep (Apple Watch / Helio ring) and daily activity from Apple Health.
health.noData: No health data found for today. Check read access in the Health app (profile → data access → Weeko).

insights.lowReadinessIntense: Your recovery is low today ({{score}}/100). Consider whether “{{title}}” really has to happen today.
insights.lowProteinTrend: Your protein averaged {{avg}} g/day this week — the target is {{target}} g. Plan a little more protein.
insights.trainingConsistency: Nice: {{days}} training days in the last 7 days. Keep it up!
insights.regenerationDayIntense: Today is a recovery day — “{{title}}” is an intense session. Better to go easy or reschedule.
insights.highTrainingStreak: {{days}} training days in a row. Take a rest day so you can recover.
insights.progressionStalled: No new best on {{exercise}} for {{sessions}} sessions (last {{weight}} kg) — bump the weight or reps.

body.title: Body level
body.disclaimer: Estimated from sleep & heart rate — not medical advice.
